zh.lifeSummary: 當Eugenius Shaw Farquharson McFinlay於1185年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾時，他的父親Fergus Farquhar McFinley40歲，母親Donalda McHardy40歲。他和Helena McWilliam至少有1個兒子。他去世於1223年在他的家鄉享年38歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Farquharson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (eastern Scotland, especially Aberdeenshire and Angus): from the Gaelic personal name Fearchar (see Farquhar ) + the English patronymic suffix -son.
History: As a clan, the Farquharsons are descended from Farquhar Macintosh, a grandson of the laird Macintosh who came to Braemar (Aberdeenshire) before 1332.

variants.name: Farquhar
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire, Caithness, and Glasgow) and northern Irish (Armagh and Antrim): from an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Fearchar, from fear ‘man’ + car ‘loving, beloved’, or a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhearchair.

nameMeanings.name: McFinlay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McKinley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionnlaigh, a patronymic from the early personal name Fionnlaoch (see Finley ).

History: William McKinley (1843–1901), 25th US president, was born at Niles, OH, a descendant of David McKinley, known as ‘David the Weaver’, of Scotch–Irish stock, who settled in York County, PA, c. 1743. William McKinley's family were iron founders who tracked the ore from the Susquehanna Valley in PA to Columbiana County, OH.

nameMeanings.name: Shaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name meaning ‘wood, copse’ (Old English sceaga, Old Norse skógr).

en.lifeSummary: When Eugenius Shaw Farquharson McFinlay was born in 1185, in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Fergus Farquhar McFinley, was 40 and his mother, Donalda McHardy, was 40. He had at least 1 son with Helena McWilliam. He died in 1223, in his hometown, at the age of 38, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eugenius Shaw Farquharson McFinlay est né en 1185, à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Fergus Farquhar McFinley, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Donalda McHardy, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Helena McWilliam. Il est décédé en 1223, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom

Er hatte mit Helena McWilliam mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1223 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Helena McWilliam. Morì nel 1223, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ko.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Eugenius Shaw Farquharson McFinlay(이)가 1185년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fergus Farquhar McFinley(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Donalda McHardy(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Helena McWilliam(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1223년 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

ru.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eugenius Shaw Farquharson McFinlay родился в 1185 г. в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Fergus Farquhar McFinley было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Donalda McHardy, 40. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Helena McWilliam. Он умер в 1223 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.
